boardSubtitle: Alert-focused prompt tuning workbench with sample review, revisions, validation, and batch scoring

meta.title: Alert Context
meta.desc: Loads the current alert from the sample cursor and shows the concrete rows the prompt is being judged against.

compute.expr: $exists(fetched_sources.alert_context.sample_note) and $trim(fetched_sources.alert_context.sample_note) != '' ? fetched_sources.alert_context.sample_note : 'Use this alert as a concrete tuning sample. Preview rows should make the failure mode visible.'

meta.title: Batch Runner
meta.desc: Run the current prompt across a sample set to see whether changes generalize beyond one alert.

meta.title: Run Scorecard
meta.desc: Summarize the accumulated run ledger so you can see whether the prompt is improving across iterated samples.

compute.expr:
'**Total Samples:** ' & $string(fetched_sources.ledger_summary.scorecard.total_samples) & '  
**Structured Plans:** ' & $string(fetched_sources.ledger_summary.scorecard.structured_plan_count) & '  
**Code Extracted:** ' & $string(fetched_sources.ledger_summary.scorecard.code_extracted_count) & '  
**Strong Candidates:** ' & $string(fetched_sources.ledger_summary.scorecard.strong_candidate_count) & '  
**Partial Passes:** ' & $string(fetched_sources.ledger_summary.scorecard.partial_pass_count) & '  
**Needs Revision:** ' & $string(fetched_sources.ledger_summary.scorecard.needs_revision_count)

meta.title: Code Execution
meta.desc: Runs extracted code for the current sample through the existing ModularCode executor.

meta.title: Failure Patterns
meta.desc: Cluster repeated failure modes from the run ledger so prompt changes target patterns instead of anecdotes.

meta.title: Tuning Guidance
meta.desc: Capture the durable guidance this stage should optimize for across many samples.

compute.expr: $exists(card_data.guidance_text) and $trim(card_data.guidance_text) != '' ? card_data.guidance_text : '_Write the rules of what good output should look like for this stage._'

card_data.guidance_text:
- Output should be structurally parseable before it is considered useful.
- Prefer concise, stage-specific instructions over broad generic language.
- Tune for robustness across TP and FP samples, not one-off wins.

meta.title: Observations
meta.desc: Capture short empirical notes about regressions, improvements, and repeated failure behavior.

compute.expr: $exists(card_data.observation_text) and $trim(card_data.observation_text) != '' ? card_data.observation_text : '_Write short observations after batch runs._'

card_data.observation_text: - Use this card to record what changed across multiple samples, not just one run.

meta.title: Prompt Workbench
meta.desc: Browse the available Medeina prompt slots, inspect the selected prompt file, and draft edits in card_data.

compute.expr: $exists(card_data.prompt_draft) and $trim(card_data.prompt_draft) != '' ? '**Draft mode:** using the edited prompt draft for the next run.' : '**File mode:** next run will use the current repo prompt unchanged.'

meta.title: Revision Proposal
meta.desc: Propose the next prompt revision from current failures, guidance, and observations.

meta.title: Run Ledger
meta.desc: Accumulate one row per sample run so the board can summarize repeated behavior without one giant batch call.

compute.expr: fetched_sources.ledger_write.skipped ? '**Ledger:** no new entry was written yet.' : ('**Ledger:** ' & (fetched_sources.ledger_write.appended ? 'appended' : (fetched_sources.ledger_write.updated ? 'updated' : 'unchanged')) & ' sample ' & fetched_sources.ledger_write.entry.alert_id & '.')

meta.title: Sample Cursor
meta.desc: Advance through the chosen sample set one alert at a time. This is the counter that drives the single-run chain.

meta.title: Sample Set
meta.desc: Choose the sample set and iteration limits that the board will walk through one sample at a time.

compute.expr:
'**Sample Set:** ' & fetched_sources.selected_set.title & '  
**Description:** ' & fetched_sources.selected_set.description & '  
**Counts:** ' & $string(fetched_sources.selected_set.counts.total) & ' total / ' & $string(fetched_sources.selected_set.counts.tp) & ' TP / ' & $string(fetched_sources.selected_set.counts.fp) & ' FP / ' & $string(fetched_sources.selected_set.counts.bp) & ' BP'

meta.title: Stage Runner
meta.desc: Run the current prompt stage against the sample selected by the cursor.

compute.expr: fetched_sources.stage_run.stage_kind = 'plan' ? (fetched_sources.stage_run.plan_step_count > 0 ? '**Next:** move to codegen only if this plan is specific enough to be executable.' : '**Next:** tighten the planner prompt so it returns a rigid, parseable plan with non-empty steps.') : (($exists(fetched_sources.stage_run.extracted_code) and $trim(fetched_sources.stage_run.extracted_code) != '') ? '**Next:** run the generated code and inspect the execution output.' : '**Next:** make the codegen prompt explicit about returning exactly one fenced python block.')

meta.title: Tuning Target
meta.desc: Select the alert sample and prompt slot to tune. This card publishes the working target for the rest of the board.

user_question.title: User Question
user_question.default: You will be given activities of a single user. Investigate all activities and highlight risky behavior based on the data.

target.user_question: You will be given activities of a single user. Investigate all activities and highlight risky behavior based on the data.

meta.title: Validator
meta.desc: Deterministic heuristic validation for v1. It judges whether the current stage output is usable enough to keep iterating.

compute.expr: requires.stage_run_result.stage_kind = 'plan' ? (requires.stage_run_result.plan_step_count > 0 ? '**Plan looks usable** — ' & $string(requires.stage_run_result.plan_step_count) & ' structured steps parsed.' : '**Plan needs revision** — no structured steps were parsed from the response.') : (($exists(requires.stage_run_result.extracted_code) and $trim(requires.stage_run_result.extracted_code) != '') ? (requires.execution_result.status = 'success' ? (requires.execution_result.has_output ? '**Strong candidate** — code executed and produced output.' : '**Partial pass** — code executed but produced no output.') : (requires.execution_result.status = 'error' ? '**Needs revision** — generated code failed in the executor.' : '**Awaiting execution** — code is present but has not been executed yet.')) : '**Needs revision** — no executable code was extracted.')

requires.stage_run_result.stage_kind = 'plan' ? (requires.stage_run_result.plan_step_count > 0 ? 'usable' : 'needs revision') : (($exists(requires.stage_run_result.extracted_code) and $trim(requires.stage_run_result.extracted_code) != '') ? (requires.execution_result.status = 'success' ? (requires.execution_result.has_output ? 'strong candidate' : 'partial pass') : (requires.execution_result.status = 'error' ? 'needs revision' : 'awaiting execution')) : 'needs revision')

requires.stage_run_result.stage_kind = 'codegen' and requires.execution_result.status = 'error' ? requires.execution_result.direct_feedback : (requires.stage_run_result.stage_kind = 'plan' and requires.stage_run_result.plan_step_count = 0 ? 'The planner response needs to be made more structured so that Steps can be parsed reliably.' : 'Use this card as a gate: keep iterating until the current stage result is structurally usable.')

requires.stage_run_result.stage_kind = 'plan' ? (requires.stage_run_result.plan_step_count > 0 ? '**Action:** move to codegen or refine the plan wording for clarity.' : '**Action:** make the planner prompt demand a rigid JSON response with non-empty Steps.') : (($exists(requires.stage_run_result.extracted_code) and $trim(requires.stage_run_result.extracted_code) != '') ? (requires.execution_result.status = 'success' ? (requires.execution_result.has_output ? '**Action:** inspect whether the output is actually useful for the investigation, then iterate on specificity.' : '**Action:** tell the codegen prompt to emit code that logs concrete intermediate results.') : (requires.execution_result.status = 'error' ? '**Action:** feed the execution error back into the next codegen run.' : '**Action:** trigger code execution before judging the code quality.')) : '**Action:** revise the codegen prompt so it returns exactly one fenced python block.')
